title: schoenoplectus orthorhizomatus
intro: Schoenoplectus orthorhizomatus, also known as common cattail, is a perennial aquatic plant species that belongs to the cattail family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and alleviating skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, Schoenoplectus orthorhizomatus is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
